articles.title: France: Growth outlook softens on weaker business climate – ING
articles.snippet: ING economist Charlotte de Montpellier notes that French business confidence fell further in February, with the overall climate below its long‑term average and services particularly weak.

combined_text:
[0.33] France: Growth outlook softens on weaker business climate – ING
ING economist Charlotte de Montpellier notes that French business confidence fell further in February, with the overall climate below its long‑term average and services particularly weak.
